title: Our Technology Stack
content: We utilize the latest enterprise-grade technologies for maximum performance and security.
list: Frontend: React, Next.js, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
Security: OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite, Nmap, JWT, HTTPS, CSP
details:
**Overview**: Our stack is specifically chosen to deliver lightning-fast response times (like this chatbot!) and unbreakable security.

We leverage Next.js for SEO-optimized frontend rendering, and Node.js with Express for scalable, secure backend microservices. Databases are hosted on secure MongoDB clusters.
